commands.title: Command not found
commands.details:
The command your searching isn't existing
Use `/help` to get all the commands available

help.title: So... you requested Raijin help ?
help.description:
You need my help ?
Well then select a category down there that can help you <:raidenbird:1080897824440455288>

**Specific command**:
You need help with a specific command ? Use the **command** option with `/help` to get more details

**Useful links**:
 • ⚡ [Raijin City](https://discord.gg/2AePNcphrs)
 • <:github:1233415410641272903> [Raijin Github](https://github.com/CodingMakoto/Raiden-Shogun-Discord-Bot)

callback.title: <:heizouimthebest:1081239099039547472> You want to jump into your new adventure ?
callback.description:
Here are the commands related to the story. All of these commands are explained with the command `/help` and the **command** option <:raidenexplaining:1080898396342194208>
> /story mode
> /story profile
> /story chapters
> /story quests

story.title: Story
story.description: Start a new day with Makoto

shops.title: Shops
shops.description: Meet new people and buy objects to collect them

personal.title: Personal
personal.description: Everything about your Adventure with Raijin and Genshin Impact

quests.1: Go talk to Makoto and ask him for an information
quests.3: Discover your profile in Genshin Impact

story.0: You will be approaching the beginning of your adventure but first you must know that you must use the buttons below to select the rest of the story ! Each chapter of this adventure is illustrated by the image below, good luck, I believe in you <:raidenlaugh:1080898399336931429>
